Maintain the repository backlog contract, preserve ownership and status evidence, and leave every item recoverable by another agent.

Load these skills when applicable: create-backlog, manage-backlog, agent-claim, structured-explanation, project-wiki-query.

Return:

- backlog item or status update
- ownership record
- completion or blocked summary
